THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEAN LENG SARY DBA THE BAYON $2,458.77 PRINCIPAL, $47.15 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,505.92, AND $50.00/MO. ON 1/15/93 AND ON EVERY 15TH OF EVERY MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
